items.title: Waterfront Properties
items.description: Specialized knowledge of Miami Beach, Key Biscayne, and Coconut Grove waterfront estates and condominiums.

items.title: Dock & Marine Access
items.description: Expert evaluation of dock permits, seawall conditions, and marine access for boating enthusiasts.

items.title: Coastal Living Guidance
items.description: Insurance, flood zones, and maintenance considerations unique to waterfront ownership.

data.title: Find Your Waterfront Home
data.subtitle: Let's explore Miami's finest waterfront properties.

data.bio: Natalia Voss specializes in waterfront properties across Miami Beach, Key Biscayne, and Coconut Grove. With expertise in dock permits, seawall assessments, and coastal property considerations, she helps buyers navigate the unique aspects of waterfront ownership. Bilingual in English and German.
